name: boost
description: Skill bundle for github.com/xgodev/boost — the Go application kernel for HTTP APIs (Echo) and event-driven functions (Pub/Sub, NATS, Kafka via CloudEvents). One plugin, many skills: boost-core (Iron Laws, required) + 17 subsystem-specific skills (factory, bootstrap, wrapper, fx, extra, maintainer). Each skill is independently versioned in its own SKILL.md frontmatter; the plugin version bumps when any skill changes.
